top_signals.title: S&P 500 Posts Eighth Weekly Gain as AI Stocks Power Rally
top_signals.summary: US stocks advanced, notching gains ahead of a long holiday weekend fueled by hopes for resolution of hostilities in the Middle East and relentless enthusiasm for artificial intelligence-linked trades.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU rejects UK push to create a single market for goods
top_signals.summary: Brussels said it would only discuss the ‘reset’ package of measures at the bloc’s next summit with Britain
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Indian youth ‘cockroach’ protest goes viral
top_signals.summary: New online movement adopts mascot of household pest to express frustration over rising unemployment

top_signals.title: Judge tosses Kilmar Abrego Garcia charges, calls Trump administration prosecution 'vindictive'
top_signals.summary: A judge found Trump’s DOJ targeted Kilmar Abrego Garcia after he challenged his mistaken deportation to El Salvador.
